title: monocera rugosa
intro: Monocera rugosa, also known as the rough-stemmed monocera, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Monocera rugosa include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly prepared by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
